title: The Jamia Millia Islamia Act, 1988
full_text: The Jamia Millia Islamia Act, 1988 जामिया मिल्लिया इस्लामिया अधिनियम, 1988 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198858 Act Number: 58 Enactment Date: 1988-10-08 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The Jamia Millia Islamia Act, 1988 Hindi Title: जामिया मिल्लिया इस्लामिया अधिनियम, 1988 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching University in the Union territory of Delhi and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 26-12-1988 Notification: 26th December, 1988, vide notifications No. S.O. 1195(E), dated 21st December, 1988, See Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Jamia Millia Islamia Act, 1988 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The University. Section 4. Dissolution of the Jamia Millia Islamia Society and transfer of all property to the University. Section 5. Objects of the University. Section 6. Powers of the University. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. The Visitor. Section 9. Officers of the University. Section 10. The Amir-i-Jamia (Chancellor). Section 11. The Shaikh-ul-Jamia (Vice-Chancellor). Section 12. The Naib Shaikh-ul-Jamia (Pro-Vice-Chancellor). Section 13. The Musajjil (Registrar). Section 14. Deans of Faculties. Section 15. The Finance Officer. Section 16. Other officers. Section 17. Authorities of the University. Section 18. The Anjuman (Court). Section 19. The Majlis-i-Muntazimah (Executive Council). Section 20. The Majlis-i-Talimi (Academic Council). Section 21. The Planning Board. Section 22. Other authorities of the University. Section 23. Power to make Statutes. Section 24. Statutes how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Power to make Regulations. Section 27. Annual report. Section 28. Annual accounts. Section 29. Conditions of services of employees. Section 30. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 31. Right to appeal. Section 32. Provident and pension funds. Section 33. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 34. Constitution of Committees. Section 35. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 36. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 37. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 38. Mode of proof of University record. Section 39. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 40. Power to remove difficulties. Section 41. Transitional provisions.
